ground_truth_rationale: Plan passes all reviewPlan invariants: phases non-empty (2 phases), each phase has non-empty instructions, non-empty dod, all dod commands are valid shell commands (test -f, grep -q). Acceptance non-empty and all shell commands. This is a clear APPROVED case.
